changes: IronClaw shipped fresh stable release ironclaw-v0.27.0, published on 2026-04-29 06:45 UTC.
Hermes Agent still has no newer release than v2026.4.23, but it climbed again to roughly 123.7k stars in this scan.
OpenClaw did not cut a newer release after yesterday's stable v2026.4.26, but the repo remained active and still anchors the category.
The rest of the Tier 1 and Tier 2 map looks active, but there is no material taxonomy shift versus the previous run.
whyItMatters: IronClaw is one of the clearest security-first alternatives in the map, so a same-day stable release is meaningful even without changing the overall category structure.
Hermes' continued growth reinforces that the learning-loop lane remains strategically important even without a newer tag.
OpenClaw stayed strategically steady today, so the notable movement happened around the anchor rather than through a new core reset.
Net: this run had real ecosystem motion, but it still reinforces the existing strategic read rather than changing it.
